rulings.Rulings: CONTINUED TO 1/11/02 IN DEPT. 301: MOVING & OPPOSING PARTY TO LODGE COURTESY COPIES PER LOCAL RULE 8.5. PLEASE ATTACH COVER LETTER CONFIRMING NEW HEARING DATE.

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Order Dismissing Complaint With Prejudice
MOTION Request To The Court To Take Judical Notice

rulings.Rulings: FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION WRONGFUL DISCHARGE: DENY TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE CONSTRUCTIVE DISCHARGE BASED UPON INVASIONS OF PRIVACY. SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF H&S CODE: DENY TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE OXO BEING PRIMARILY RESPONSIBLE FOR THE DRUG TESTING-MEDICAL EXPERIMENT. THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION INVASION OF PRIVACY: DENY DISCLOSURE OF NAME TO THIRD PARTY WHEN SPECIFICALLY ASKED NOT TO, AND CONSENT TO DISCLOSE TO CO-WORKERS. DISCLOSURE TO CO-WORKERS WITHOUT CONSENT. FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION B&P 17200 VIOLATION: DENY. FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION BATTERY: GRANT NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE OFFENSIVE TOUCHING BY OXO. SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS: GRANT NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE SEVERE EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. (CW)

rulings.Rulings: DEFT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT - GRANT, NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT THAT DEFENDANT CURED THE DEFECT IN A TIMELY MANNER.
